notes: Must come with reference page including

questions.text: Piece of plastic has a charge of negative 0.0006 Coulombs is brought near a sweater with a charge of positive 0.0008 Coulombs. They are 0.8 meters apart. Determine the magnitude of force between them, and determine if that force is attractive or repulsive.
Within an atom, two electrons are separated by a distance of 2 Angstrom. Determine the magnitude of force between them, and determine if that force is attractive or repulsive.
